数据库中花费在写数据文件的时间，pg中脏页一般写入page cache，如果这个: Time spent writing data files. In PG dirty pages are normally written to the page cache; a high value means the cache is small and the OS cache has to flush more aggressively
数据库中花费在读取文件的时间，这个值很高说明内存较小，需要频繁从磁盘读入数据文件: Time spent reading data files. A high value means memory is insufficient and data files are frequently read from disk
